WITH cust_annual AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS annual_cons
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(annual_cons) AS min_cons
    FROM cust_annual
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT min_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT min_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT min_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT min_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT min_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT min_cons FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_min
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH monthly_euros AS (
    SELECT
        ym.CustomerID,
        ym.Date,
        SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS euros
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN transactions_1k t
        ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
       AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = ym.Date
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, ym.Date
),
segment_year AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        CASE WHEN substr(me.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN 2012 ELSE 2013 END AS year,
        SUM(me.euros) AS total_euros
    FROM monthly_euros me
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = me.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      AND substr(me.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, year
),
growth AS (
    SELECT
        s12.Segment,
        ((s13.total_euros - s12.total_euros) * 100.0 / s12.total_euros) AS growth_percent
    FROM segment_year s12
    JOIN segment_year s13
        ON s12.Segment = s13.Segment
       AND s12.year = 2012
       AND s13.year = 2013
)
SELECT Segment, growth_percent
FROM growth
ORDER BY growth_percent DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

SELECT Segment, growth_percent
FROM growth
ORDER BY growth_percent ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT ee.event_name
FROM (
    SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, SUM(ex.cost) AS total_expense
    FROM event e
    JOIN budget b ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
    JOIN expense ex ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    WHERE e.status = 'completed'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
) ee
JOIN (
    SELECT e.event_id, SUM(b.amount) AS total_budget
    FROM event e
    JOIN budget b ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
    WHERE e.status = 'completed'
    GROUP BY e.event_id
) eb ON ee.event_id = eb.event_id
WHERE ee.total_expense - eb.total_budget = (
    SELECT MAX(ee2.total_expense - eb2.total_budget)
    FROM (
        SELECT e.event_id, SUM(ex.cost) AS total_expense
        FROM event e
        JOIN budget b ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
        JOIN expense ex ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
        WHERE e.status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
    ) ee2
    JOIN (
        SELECT e.event_id, SUM(b.amount) AS total_budget
        FROM event e
        JOIN budget b ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
        WHERE e.status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY e.event_id
    ) eb2 ON ee2.event_id = eb2.event_id
)
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	student_club

WITH RECURSIVE split(post_id, tag, rest) AS (
  SELECT p.Id,
         CASE
           WHEN instr(inner, '><')>0 THEN substr(inner, 1, instr(inner, '><')-1)
           ELSE inner
         END,
         CASE
           WHEN instr(inner, '><')>0 THEN substr(inner, instr(inner, '><')+2)
           ELSE ''
         END
  FROM (
    SELECT p.Id,
           substr(p.Tags,2,length(p.Tags)-2) AS inner
    FROM posts p
    JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments c WHERE c.PostId = p.Id)
      AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
  ) p
  UNION ALL
  SELECT post_id,
         CASE
           WHEN instr(rest, '><')>0 THEN substr(rest, 1, instr(rest, '><')-1)
           ELSE rest
         END,
         CASE
           WHEN instr(rest, '><')>0 THEN substr(rest, instr(rest, '><')+2)
           ELSE ''
         END
  FROM split
  WHERE rest != ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split
WHERE tag != '';	----- bird -----	codebase_community

WITH female AS (

         birth_date,
         district_id,
         (strftime('%Y', DATE('now')) - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) -
         (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', DATE('now')) < strftime('%m-%d', birth_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS age
  FROM client
  WHERE gender = 'F'
),
min_inc AS (SELECT MIN(A10) AS min_inc FROM district),
max_inc AS (SELECT MAX(A10) AS max_inc FROM district),
lowest_dist AS (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A10 = (SELECT min_inc FROM min_inc)),
oldest AS (
  SELECT f.client_id, f.age
  FROM female f
  JOIN lowest_dist ld ON f.district_id = ld.district_id
  WHERE f.age = (SELECT MAX(age) FROM female f2 JOIN lowest_dist ld2 ON f2.district_id = ld2.district_id)
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT max_inc - min_inc FROM max_inc, min_inc) AS income_diff

JOIN oldest o ON d.client_id = o.client_id;	----- bird -----	financial
